rules.title: Data Encryption
rules.description: Personal data must be encrypted both at rest and in transit
rules.remediation: Implement encryption for all personal data using industry-standard algorithms (AES-256, RSA-2048+).

rules.title: Access Controls
rules.description: Access to personal data must be restricted and controlled
rules.remediation: Implement authentication and role-based access control. Ensure principle of least privilege.

rules.title: Processing Activity Records
rules.description: Maintain records of all data processing activities
rules.remediation: Implement comprehensive audit logging for all personal data access and processing activities.

rules.title: Data Protection by Design
rules.description: Privacy and data protection must be built into system design
rules.remediation: Document privacy-by-design principles. Implement data minimization, purpose limitation, and privacy-preserving defaults.

rules.title: Breach Detection and Notification
rules.description: System must detect and enable notification of data breaches within 72 hours
rules.remediation: Implement real-time monitoring and alerting for security incidents. Create breach response procedures.
